artifacts.title: Baby receipt from 2024-05-21
artifacts.excerpt:
some controversial baby-rearing practices that I think are pretty cool and based:

- montessori floor bed
- elimination communication
- baby-led weaning
- glass and ceramic tableware
- no socks or mittens
- minimal babyproofing

(my reasons why below 🧵) https://t.co/Vb6gdSsTBz
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: baby, good, now, really.

planets.name: Montessori
planets.summary: Archive cluster around montessori: 285 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Montessori receipt from 2024-05-09
artifacts.excerpt: the biggest montessori pill is seeing under 2s pour themselves water from a glass pitcher to a glass cup, calmly get a towel to wipe up some that spilled, take the wet towel to a pail, come back to drink the water then carefully wash and dry their glass cup - all unprompted
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: montessori, child, maria, materials.

artifacts.title: Montessori receipt from 2024-05-21
artifacts.excerpt:
on the topic, in montessori we use REAL tableware with babies from the beginning: glass cups, ceramic plates, stainless steel utensils...
babies can use these just fine, and they help understand cause and effect - because misuse will result in loud sounds or even breaking https://t.co/WZPNgFd3iJ
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: montessori, child, maria, materials.

artifacts.title: Montessori receipt from 2025-08-21
artifacts.excerpt: busy boards are interesting because while they can look like Montessori materials to some (real world objects! fine motor skills! wood!) in fact they are not - bc the elements are disconnected from their purpose. the locks don't open doors, the switches don't turn on lights, etc.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: montessori, child, maria, materials.

artifacts.title: Montessori receipt from 2025-04-28
artifacts.excerpt: love a good Montessori quote https://t.co/3Nzu8ImWJZ
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: montessori, child, maria, materials.
